title: Reaction Time Test
description: Measure your visual reaction speed in milliseconds. Click the moment you see green — benchmark yourself against the world.

seo.metaTitle: Reaction Time Test – Free Online Reflex Speed Test
seo.metaDescription: Measure your reaction time online for free. Click when the screen turns green and find out how you rank globally. No signup needed.

howToPlay: Click or tap anywhere to begin the test.
Wait for the screen to turn green — don't click early!
Click as fast as you can the moment you see green.
Complete 5 rounds for your averaged final score.
Share your result and challenge friends.
content.science: Reaction time is the interval between a stimulus and the initiation of a motor response. The average human visual reaction time sits around 250ms. Your brain processes the green signal through the optic nerve to the visual cortex, then fires a motor command down the spinal cord to your finger — all in milliseconds. Age, fatigue, caffeine, and practice all meaningfully affect this number. Elite gamers and athletes typically score below 200ms through deliberate training.
tips: Use your index finger — it has the fastest motor pathway of any finger.
Don't try to anticipate the green — clicking early invalidates the round.
Take 1–2 practice rounds first to prime your neuromuscular response.
Wired mouse on desktop gives the most accurate latency.
Consistent sleep measurably improves reaction time by 10–20ms.
